name: Applesauce-Bran Muffins (Lf)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. In a large bowl, combine cereal and milk. Set aside.
3. In another bowl, whisk together egg, applesauce, and melted butter.
4. Stir the wet ingredients into the cereal mixture until just blended.
5. Add the dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, brown sugar) to the batter and stir until combined.
6. Spray a muffin tin with cooking spray or line it with baking cups.
7. Fill each cup about 3/4 full with the batter.
8. Bake at 400°F for 15 minutes or until the muffins are nicely browned on top.
9. Makes 12 muffins. Each serving contains approximately 117 calories, 23mg cholesterol, 4g dietary fiber, 2.5g fat, and 238 mg sodium.
